title: (Bearish Signal)
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
For the last three days, Tickeron's A.I.dvisor has detected that GRVY's AroonDown red line is above 70 while the AroonUp green line is below 30 for three straight days. This move could indicate a strong downtrend ahead for GRVY, and traders may view it as a Sell signal for the next month. Traders may consider selling the stock or exploring put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested this indicator and found 139 similar cases, 124 of which were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 89%. Current price $122.13 crossed the support line at $122.50 and is trading between $122.50 support and $118.62 support lines. Throughout the month of 01/22/21 - 02/24/21, the price experienced a -29% Downtrend. During the week of 02/17/21 - 02/24/21, the stock fell -10%.

https://preview.redd.it/g0ukwcmjooj61.png?width=1535&format=png&auto=webp&s=1d625e420f88588dfe802e6814e7fbf1f170af7f

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved below the 0 level on February 11, 2021. You may want to consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options on GRVY as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 68 of 89 cases where the Momentum Indicator fell below 0, the stock fell further within the subsequent month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 76%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram (MACD) for GRVY turned negative on February 16, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to turn lower in the coming weeks. Traders may want to sell the stock or buy put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 47 similar instances when the indicator turned negative. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 39 of the 47 cases the stock turned lower in the days that followed. This puts the odds of success at 83%.

GRVY moved below its 50-day Moving Average on January 29, 2021 date and that indicates a change from an upward trend to a downward trend.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where GRVY declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 79%.

The Aroon Indicator for GRVY entered a downward trend on February 24, 2021. This could indicate a strong downward move is ahead for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/9511573-gravity-co-ltd-adr-s-grvy-129-74-aroon-indicator-entered-a-downtrend-on-february-24-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
